name: The Classic Route: Tehran → Kashan → Isfahan → Yazd → Shiraz
highlights: Persepolis|Naqsh-e Jahan Square|Yazd Old City|Fin Garden|Pasargadae|Si-o-se Pol Bridge

name: Silk Road: Bazargan → Tabriz → Tehran → Mashhad → Turkmenistan
highlights: Tabriz Grand Bazaar|Kandovan village|Tehran museums|Mashhad Imam Reza Shrine|Nishapur|Silk Road caravanserais

name: Caspian Coast: Astara → Rasht → Ramsar → Sari → Gorgan
highlights: Hyrcanian Forests (UNESCO)|Masuleh village|Ramsar thermal springs|Golestan National Park|Veresk Bridge

name: Persian Gulf: Bandar Abbas → Qeshm → Hormuz
highlights: Hormuz Island rainbow soil|Qeshm Geo Park|Stars Valley|Hara mangrove forests

name: Western Mountains: Kermanshah → Sanandaj → Hamadan → Zanjan
Lut Desert Crossing: Kerman → Shahdad → Nebka → Kerman
highlights: Lut Desert (UNESCO)|Kaluts sand castles|Shahdad palm groves|Night sky — zero light pollution

name: Caucasus Circuit: Tabriz → Norduz → Armenia → Georgia → (back to Tabriz)
Alborz Passes: Tehran → Chalus Road → Caspian → Haraz Road → Tehran
highlights: Chalus Road (Iran's most scenic drive)|Kandovan tunnel|Caspian coast|Haraz valley|Alamut Castle
